query:
SELECT r.id, r.name 
FROM regions r 
JOIN countries c ON c.id = r.countryId 
WHERE c.code = 'ES' AND r.isActive = 1 
ORDER BY r.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT r.id, r.name
